sections.title: During Making Friends with My Arm

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Hey, human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: I am Root.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that all you have to say about yourself?

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: I am Root.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, I suppose that's enough for some people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about this place.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: This here is Weiss. Trolls built it years ago, after we got kicked out from caves further south. Now Weiss is our home.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: We done pretty good here. Got lots of goat and wolf to eat - they taste kinda boring after all this time, but there not much other choice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ever tried goutweed? I know trolls who love it. In fact My Arm is an expert on growing the stuff.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Never heard of no gouty weed, no. But it sound like a vegetable, an' Mother not like eating those, so we probably not gonna try it.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Mother not like new ideas much, but he really big, an' he boss, so we do what he say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you like it here?

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Eh, it kinda rough, but it our home. Odd Mushroom say he can make it nicer with fancy fires what he invented, but Mother not interested in that, so Odd Mushroom not allowed to do it.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Mother only care about stuff to help him fight better. An he really big, an' he boss, so we do what he say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off.

sections.title: After Making Friends with My Arm

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Hey, friend of Snowflake!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: I am Root.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that all you have to say about yourself?

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: I am Root.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, I suppose that's enough for some people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about this place.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: This here is Weiss. Trolls built it years ago, after we got kicked out from caves further south. Now Weiss is our home.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: It great here, now Snowflake an' her husband troll taught us goutweed farming. Food so much better now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you like it here?

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: Eh, it kinda rough, but it getting better. Snowflake, she taught us goutweed farming. Goat, wolf, human all taste so much nicer with goutweed in.

lines.speaker: Root
lines.text: So yeah, Weiss is good place to live, now Snowflake in charge. All trolls like Snowflake. Her husband troll kinda weird, but that not our problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off.
